generated_oml:
instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for research and educational purposes"
    base:contains GantryCrane, RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor, PhysicalCraneInterface, MQTTBroker, TimescaleDB
]

instance GantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with controller for research and education"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program interface for publishing crane state data via MQTT"
]

instance RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry-Pi sensors used for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors on the gantry crane measuring state parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality data from Raspberry-Pi sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDataProcessingEnabler, AirQualitySimulationEnabler, AirQualityPredictionEnabler
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDataProcessingEnabler, LoggingApplication
]

instance AutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based model for indoor air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualitySimulationEnabler, AirQualityPredictionEnabler
]

instance AzureDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for digital twin pipeline management and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, PredictionService
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application that subscribes to MQTT topics and logs data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker for real-time data transmission"
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage"
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for deployment of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying digital twin components using containerization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deployment status and configuration of digital twin components"
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for version control of digital twin models and code"
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control of digital twin assets"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version history and change tracking of digital twin components"
]

instance AirQualitySimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulating indoor air quality using AutomationML model"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance AirQualityPredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for predicting virus spread using air quality data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical data of crane operations and air quality"
    DTDFVocab:provides LogDataAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of crane operations and indoor air quality"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityVisualizationInsight, CraneVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating indoor air quality scenarios for virus spread prevention"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualitySimulationInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting virus spread based on air quality data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VirusSpreadPredictionInsight
]

instance LogDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous logging of sensor data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of indoor air quality data for virus spread prevention"
]

instance CraneVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of gantry crane operational state"
]

instance CraneControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal control actions for gantry crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of synchronization between physical and digital twin components"
]

instance AirQualitySimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation of indoor air quality dynamics for virus spread analysis"
]

instance VirusSpreadPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of virus transmission risk based on indoor air quality parameters"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Human Machine Interface (HMI) or Trajectory Generator Service are transmitted via MQTT to the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to execute movements on the Physical Crane. Command formats, validation, authentication, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Uses containerization for component deployment and integration, following an ad-hoc architectural approach without a commercial digital twin framework, with system architecture visualized using the C4 Model's context and container diagrams."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs an MQTT publish-subscribe architecture for inter-service communication, with the MQTT Broker as the central hub. Network topology is centralized, but bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML is used as a modeling standard, and Microsoft Azure tools are employed for cloud services, though specific compliance frameworks or certifications are not detailed in the documents."
]
